title: ContextBuilder + RoleContextView

RoleContextView.validation: rejects unknown role; worker requires non-empty task_id

methods.name: build
methods.signature: build(*, run_id, view: RoleContextView, budget: ContextBudget, agent_id, at_sequence, estimator='char4') -> ContextSnapshot
steps: enforce trust boundary (external_untrusted in L0/L1 rejected)
apply role scope (shared / coordinator / reviewer / worker:<task_id>)
resolve conflicts (two facts with same layer/task_id, different content)
select within budget (protected + keep-priority sorted evictable)
compact if required (Phase D injection point — stub in Phase C)

exclusion_reasons.scope_mismatch: item scope does not match role view
exclusion_reasons.superseded: superseded by a newer item in candidate set
exclusion_reasons.conflict: two active fact items with same layer/task_id but different content

protected_set.description: Items never evicted by budget pressure (SOP §8.1)
rules: layer in (L0, L1) — Constitution and Role
kind == evidence_ref — Evidence ID / source reference
kind == todo AND valid_to_sequence is None — unresolved todos
protected_set.behavior: If protected total exceeds usable_input, raises ContextBudgetExhausted (never silently drops)

eviction_priority.description: Non-protected items sorted by keep_key (reverse=True) so highest keep-priority is added first

prompt_injection_boundary.rule: external_untrusted MUST NOT enter L0 (Constitution) or L1 (Role)

scope_matching_rule.worker:<task_id>: visible only when role == worker AND view.task_id == <task_id>

test_matrix_coverage.C-01: Worker isolation (Worker A cannot see Worker B private items)
test_matrix_coverage.C-02: Reviewer isolation (Reviewer cannot see Worker hypothesis)
test_matrix_coverage.C-03: Provenance (every included item traceable via source_ref)
test_matrix_coverage.C-04: Exclusion reason (every excluded item has non-empty reason)
test_matrix_coverage.C-06: Constraint retention (100% required constraint IDs retained)
test_matrix_coverage.C-09: Repeated compaction (required IDs stable across builds)
test_matrix_coverage.C-10: Injection boundary (external_untrusted rejected from L0 AND L1)

deferred_to_phase_d: Real token estimator with tokenizer (current default: char4 = 1 token per 4 chars)
Prompt renderer with <instructions> vs <untrusted_data> block separation
